description: Lock financial_derivatives to modern standardized exchange-traded listed options anchored to Cboe's 1973 launch, not generic bank derivatives.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to Cboe's 1973 listed-options launch and same-year Black-Scholes option-pricing paper.
The scoped node is exchange-traded listed options, so organized exchange infrastructure is defining.
Formal probability/statistical valuation enabled modern listed-options pricing but was not the exchange itself.
Broad banking is too generic for the listed-options scope and should not be a direct edge.
